description:
Create a master dark frame to remove thermal noise and cosmic rays. 

Starting from AstroImageJ, complete the following workflow:
1. Navigate to File > Import > Image Sequence... and select the directory `~/AstroImages/raw/darks/` to import all 5 raw dark FITS files as a stack.
2. Navigate to Image > Stacks > Z Project... to open the ZProjection dialog.
3. Set the 'Projection type' to 'Median' (this is critical to reject cosmic ray hits that appear in single frames).
4. Click OK to project the stack into a combined 2D image.
5. Save the resulting active 2D image as a FITS file to `~/AstroImages/processed/master_dark.fits` using File > Save As > FITS.
